# ctyun_dhcpoptionset_association_vpcs (Data Source)
DHCP选项集与VPC绑定关系列表数据源



## Example

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    ctyun = {
      source = "ctyun-it/ctyun"
    }
  }
}

# 可参考index.md，在环境变量中配置ak、sk、资源池ID、可用区名称
provider "ctyun" {
  env = "prod"
}

data "ctyun_dhcpoptionset_association_vpcs" "example" {
}

output "ctyun_dhcpoptionset_association_vpcs_example" {
  value = data.ctyun_dhcpoptionset_association_vpcs.example
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `dhcp_option_sets_id` (String) DHCP选项集ID

### Optional

- `page_no` (Number) 列表的页码，默认值为1
- `page_size` (Number) 分页查询时每页的行数，最大值为50，默认值为10。
- `region_id` (String) 资源池id，如果不填则默认使用provider ctyun中的region_id或环境变量中的CTYUN_REGION_ID

### Read-Only

- `current_count` (Number) 分页查询时每页的行数。
- `total_count` (Number) 总数。
- `total_page` (Number) 总页数。
- `vpcs` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--vpcs))

<a id="nestedatt--vpcs"></a>
### Nested Schema for `vpcs`

Read-Only:

- `cidr` (String) VPC CIDR
- `name` (String) VPC名称
- `secondary_cidrs` (List of String) 扩展网段列表
- `status` (String) 状态
- `vpc_id` (String) VPC ID
